change_details: K 5 → 6 under new best (ent=0.008, wd=2e-4). New best has lower au than the prior best (3 vs 5) despite better im — the policy distributes mass to many legal moves but fewer stand clearly above uniform. Sharper value targets (K=6) may help individual legal moves develop higher probability. Under wd=1e-4 this regressed, but at wd=2e-4 the extra regularization should buffer against collapse risk from sharper gradients.
